name: Workspacer
description:
Lomotion-inspired workspace and window control with fully configurable modifier keys.

Workspace navigation (configurable modifier):
  Mod+A / Mod+S — previous / next workspace
  Mod+D / Mod+F — move window to previous / next workspace
  Mod+E         — cycle windows on current workspace

Window actions (separate configurable modifier, safe from text field conflicts):
  Mod+Q — close window
  Mod+H — minimize window

All modifier keys are changed live from the preferences page — no restart needed.
